import os
import logging
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import torch
from scipy.stats import spearmanr
from sklearn.linear_model import Ridge

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO, format='%(asctime)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

DATA_DIR = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
EMB_PATH = 'train_val_region_embeddings_v3.pt'
CHECKPOINT_DIR = 'checkpoints'


def main():
    os.makedirs(CHECKPOINT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

    logger.info("Loading embeddings from %s", EMB_PATH)
    data = torch.load(EMB_PATH, weights_only=False)
    X_train = data['train'].numpy()
    X_val = data['val'].numpy()

    train_df = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'train.csv'))
    val_df = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'val.csv'))
    y_train = train_df['target'].values.astype(np.float64)
    y_val = val_df['target'].values.astype(np.float64)

    # Standardize based on training set
    mean = X_train.mean(axis=0, keepdims=True)
    std = X_train.std(axis=0, keepdims=True) + 1e-8
    X_train_s = (X_train - mean) / std
    X_val_s = (X_val - mean) / std

    alphas = np.logspace(-2, 6, 50)

    feature_sets = {
        'full': slice(None),
        'plld': slice(-3, None)
    }

    best_spr = -np.inf
    best_cfg = None  # (name, alpha, model)

    for name, sl in feature_sets.items():
        Xt = X_train_s[:, sl]
        Xv = X_val_s[:, sl]
        for alpha in alphas:
            model = Ridge(alpha=alpha)
            model.fit(Xt, y_train)
            preds = model.predict(Xv)
            spr, _ = spearmanr(y_val, preds)
            if spr > best_spr:
                best_spr = spr
                best_cfg = (name, alpha, model)
        logger.info("Feature set %s best val spr so far: %.5f", name, best_spr)

    best_name, best_alpha, _ = best_cfg
    logger.info("Overall best: feature_set=%s, alpha=%.4f, val_spr=%.5f",
                best_name, best_alpha, best_spr)

    # Retrain on combined train+val with the best hyperparameters
    X_all = np.concatenate([X_train_s, X_val_s], axis=0)
    y_all = np.concatenate([y_train, y_val], axis=0)
    final_model = Ridge(alpha=best_alpha)
    final_model.fit(X_all[:, feature_sets[best_name]], y_all)

    ckpt = {
        'model': final_model,
        'mean': torch.from_numpy(mean),
        'std': torch.from_numpy(std),
        'feature_set': best_name,
        'alpha': float(best_alpha),
    }
    save_path = os.path.join(CHECKPOINT_DIR, 'sklearn_model.pt')
    torch.save(ckpt, save_path)
    logger.info("Saved sklearn model to %s", save_path)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
